title: App test seam
task: Add App.createForTest(deps) static factory and resolveCategoryForTest(transaction, categories) async wrapper on App per DEC-0006. Assign injected openAi, accountCategoryMappingService, autoCategorizationService, wordMapping, categoryMappingService to private fields without calling run().
acceptance: createForTest(deps) returns App instance without Express/Socket.io bootstrap
Injected deps assigned to matching private fields when non-null
No Option B pipeline extraction or env gates added
